ValidationRule.description: The Payee on the Invoice can not be changed to anything other than Lessor on the Lease, and the Payor can not be anything other than the Lessee
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(
NOT($Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c), leaseworks__Lease__r.RecordType.DeveloperName != 'Non_Lease_Agreement', NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c))), NOT(CONTAINS(TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c), 'HL/SL-')),
OR( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__Rent_Pyable_To__c))), leaseworks__Rent_Pyable_To__c != PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__Rent_Pyable_To__c) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__Rent_Payable_Frm__c))), leaseworks__Rent_Payable_Frm__c != PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__Rent_Payable_Frm__c) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The field you are attempting to modify is logic driven. This field's value cannot be changed manually.
